name: autoform
description: Front-end for autoform-bot's multi-agent pipeline that formalizes math textbooks into verified Lean 4 / Mathlib: statement extraction, the worker/review/merge formalization loop, rubric evaluation, and DAG orchestration. Commands drive the autoform-bot Python engine by default; pass --backend native to run a lighter in-session loop with no autoform-bot checkout. Bundles the lean-conventions, formalization-workflow, and eval-rubrics skills (auto-discovered when editing .lean files).
